task:
Build a RenderDoc capture-settings file at /home/user/captures/hardened.cap whose purpose is to run a Vulkan game under RenderDoc with four mandatory environment variables and a hardened option set.

The file must be valid JSON with a top-level "rdocConfigData": 1 marker and a nested "settings" object. Under settings:

- "executable" must be "/usr/local/games/hardened_game".
- "workingDir" must be "/home/user/games/hardened".
- "commandLine" must be "--vulkan --safe-mode --log-level debug".
- "environment" must be a JSON array of EXACTLY four objects, in this order:
    1. {"name": "VK_LOADER_LAYERS_ENABLE", "value": "VK_LAYER_RENDERDOC_Capture", "separator": "Platform", "mod": "Replace"}
    2. {"name": "RDOC_DEBUG_LOG",            "value": "1",                           "separator": "Platform", "mod": "Append"}
    3. {"name": "MESA_DEBUG",                "value": "silent",                      "separator": "Platform", "mod": "Replace"}
    4. {"name": "VULKAN_SDK",                "value": "/opt/vulkan",                 "separator": "Platform", "mod": "Prepend"}
- "options" must be a JSON object with exactly these booleans set as indicated: "APIValidation": true, "CaptureCallstacks": true, "CaptureAllCmdLists": true, "RefAllResources": true, "VerifyBufferAccess": true, "HookIntoChildren": false, "DebugOutputMute": false.
- "autoStart" must be false.
- "queueFrameCap" must be 3 and "numQueuedFrames" must be 10.

After creating the file, register its absolute path /home/user/captures/hardened.cap as the single entry of the "RecentCaptureSettings" JSON array in /home/user/.local/share/qrenderdoc/UI.config (a flat JSON document). The top-level "rdocConfigData": 1 marker must still be present after saving, and no other existing key may be removed or renamed.

verification.eval: isinstance(result, dict) and 'error' not in result
verification.description: hardened.cap parses as valid capture-settings JSON

verification.eval: result.get('autoStart') is False and result.get('queueFrameCap') == 3 and result.get('numQueuedFrames') == 10

verification.description: RecentCaptureSettings is exactly the hardened.cap path
